name: Entravision Communications Corporation
description: Entravision Communications Corporation is a leading global advertising, media, and ad-tech solutions company connecting brands to consumers. The company operates a premier portfolio of television and radio stations, primarily affiliated with Spanish-language networks like Univision and UniMás, alongside a robust digital advertising platform. Entravision serves clients across the United States, Latin America, Europe, Asia, and Africa, offering comprehensive marketing technology and media services to reach diverse audiences.
